content.body_md:
This is the mail system at host mx.example.net.

I'm sorry to have to inform you that your message could not
be delivered to one or more recipients.

Final-Recipient: rfc822; missing@example.com
Action: failed
Status: 5.1.1
Diagnostic-Code: smtp; 550 5.1.1 <missing@example.com>: Recipient address rejected: User unknown in local recipient table
Original-Message-ID: <orig-postfix-123@example.com>
Original-Subject: Hello there
